disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid onset of unilateral swelling and a deep aching pain in one calf over about 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: What's been happening with your leg?
When did the swelling and pain start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My right calf started aching yesterday and it's swollen right up — about twice the size of my other leg now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently returned from a 14-hour long-haul flight three days before symptom onset (prolonged immobility)
trigger_question_examples: Have you done any long trips or long periods sitting still recently?
Any recent flights, long drives or time off your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I flew back from overseas three days ago, it was a 14-hour flight and I barely moved the whole time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness, warmth and tightness of the skin over the affected calf
trigger_question_examples: Is the skin over your calf red or warm?
Does the leg feel hot or tight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin is red and it feels warm and tight, more than the other leg.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No shortness of breath, no chest pain (including on breathing in), and no coughing up blood
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any shortness of breath or chest pain?
Any coughing, especially coughing up blood, or feeling faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing's fine and I haven't had any chest pain or coughed up anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any anticoagulant or oral contraceptive; no previous clots or leg problems
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines, like blood thinners or the pill?
Have you ever had a clot in your leg or lungs before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not on any regular medicines, no blood thinners and not on the pill, and I've never had a clot before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and mobility is currently limited by the painful leg
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone at home with you?
How are you managing to get around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, and getting around is hard right now because I'm limping so badly.
